purpose: Joins every L1 dry-run input — replacement_levels, standalone artifact forge, CRT/TLS/atexit direct-link proofs, real-program smoke, dlfcn replace-boundary sentinel + L1 burndown, perf baselines + waiver audit, runtime evidence replay — into a single dashboard with pass/blocker rows. The dashboard never promotes current_level automatically; it surfaces the current L1 evidence state with exact artifact refs and source_commit, and fails closed on stale, missing, or contradictory inputs.

rows.rationale: A successful forge row is evidence only; it must never promote replacement level by itself.
LD_PRELOAD/interpose artifacts cannot substitute for standalone replacement evidence.
L1 dashboard consumers must see that standalone artifact freshness is bound to the artifact manifest source_commit.
L1 dashboard consumers must see that standalone artifact freshness compares against the current source checkout.

rows.expected_value: Complete the L1 CRT/startup/TLS proof matrix for startup, TLS, init/fini, destructors, errno isolation, secure mode, and diagnostics
rows.rationale: The dashboard must expose the transition requirement that remains tied to the CRT/startup/TLS blocker.

rows.expected_value: The declared L1 interpose level remains the current taxonomy level, and the current L1 objective-gate evidence bundle is passing with checked curated preload smoke green in strict and hardened modes.
rows.rationale: The dashboard must expose the exact reason the L1 objective gate passes.
